geographic_constraints.vulnerabilities: Extreme dependence on the US market and energy (natural gas imports from Texas).

energy_logic.substitution_cost: Extremely High (Industrial North depends on US gas pipes)

civilizational_dna.core_identity: Mestizaje, Revolutionary Nationalism, North American integration

geopolitical_priority: Maximizing Nearshoring benefits while managing internal security (cartels) and political autonomy from Washington.
